title: Raccoon Removal in Hudson Heights, Manhattan | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Hudson Heights, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Hudson Heights residents facing raccoon intrusions need swift, professional removal to protect their homes and families. Our expert raccoon removal services in Hudson Heights address everything from attic infestations to chimney invasions with humane, effective solutions. We serve all of Hudson Heights, from Fort Tryon Park area homes to riverside apartment buildings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Hudson Heights' unique urban wildlife challenges, with technicians experienced in navigating the neighborhood's mix of pre-war buildings and hillside properties. We offer same-day emergency response, humane removal methods, complete exclusion services, and thorough sanitization to ensure raccoons don't return to your Hudson Heights home.
localContext: Hudson Heights' proximity to Fort Tryon Park and the heavily wooded areas along the Hudson River creates ideal conditions for raccoon populations seeking shelter in residential spaces. The neighborhood's many older apartment buildings, multi-family homes, and houses with accessible attics and chimneys provide numerous entry points that raccoons exploit, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Hudson Heights?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Hudson Heights typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring sealing, and extent of damage. Simple single-raccoon removals start around $900, while complex cases involving families, extensive property damage, or multiple entry points can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Hudson Heights?
faqs.answer: Hudson Heights' location near Fort Tryon Park, Inwood Hill Park, and the wooded Hudson River shoreline provides abundant raccoon habitat. These intelligent animals venture from green spaces into residential areas seeking food and shelter, particularly attracted to the neighborhood's older buildings with accessible attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Garbage from the area's many apartment buildings also provides easy food sources.

faqs.question: Are raccoons in Hudson Heights dangerous?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose several risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, property damage from tearing insulation and wiring, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. They can also introduce fleas, ticks, and mites into your home. Professional removal is essential for your safety—never attempt to handle or trap raccoons yourself.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Hudson Heights home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Hudson Heights and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline depends on your situation—a single raccoon may be removed in one visit, while a mother with babies or extensive infestations may require 3-7 days for humane extraction, exclusion work, and follow-up to ensure all animals are safely removed.
